chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P. No.D-787 of 2022 Muhammad Rehan & others Versus Province of Sindh & others Date Order with signature of Judge For hearing of main case. Dated: 13.03.2025 Mr. Khurram Lakhani for petitioners. Mr. Ali Safdar Depar, Assistant Advocate General. Malik Altaf Hussain for respondents/KMC. -.-.- In the main prayer clause, petitioners seek their regularization from the date of their appointments. However, this prayer is not possible under the law as such this prayer is dismissed. However, petitioners also claim that the KMC owes salaries for a period from January 2021 to May 2021. In the event the petitioners make application(s) to KMC for payment of the aforesaid salary the same shall be considered and decided by the Financial Advisor of the KMC within three months from the date of receipt of such application through a speaking order after giving petitioners opportunity of hearing. Copy of this order shall be sent to the Municipal Commissioner/ KMC for compliance. Petition stands disposed of in the above terms. Head of Const. Benches Judge
